mapper.sql: id, trade_date, trade_time, symbol, name, side, price, quantity, amount, commission_fee, stamp_tax, transfer_fee, other_fee, total_fee, position_ratio, plan_id, reason, plan_stop_loss, plan_take_profit, followed_plan, emotion_tags, mistake_tags, actual_result, review_status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_journal ( trade_date, trade_time, symbol, name, side, price, quantity, amount, commission_fee, stamp_tax, transfer_fee, other_fee, total_fee, position_ratio, plan_id, reason, plan_stop_loss, plan_take_profit, followed_plan, emotion_tags, mistake_tags, actual_result, review_status ) VALUES ( #{tradeDate}, #{tradeTime}, #{symbol}, #{name}, #{side}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{amount}, #{commissionFee}, #{stampTax}, #{transferFee}, #{otherFee}, #{totalFee}, #{positionRatio}, #{planId}, #{reason}, #{planStopLoss}, #{planTakeProfit}, #{followedPlan}, #{emotionTags}, #{mistakeTags}, #{actualResult}, #{reviewStatus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM trade_journal WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_journal WHERE trade_date = #{tradeDate}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_journal WHERE review_status = #{reviewStatus}
SELECT FROM trade_journal WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY trade_date ASC, CASE WHEN trade_time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, trade_time ASC, id ASC
